name: Zesty Fig Pastries
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, and cornstarch for the pastry.
Add butter and process or mix until the dough holds together.
2. Divide the dough into thirds. Roll out two-thirds of it on a baking sheet (13-inch x 17-inch) to reach all corners evenly. Prick with a fork.
3. Bake in a 350°F oven for 15 minutes.
4. Roll out the remaining dough between sheets of plastic wrap or waxed paper to form a rectangle about half the size of the baking sheet (9-inch x 13-inch). Cut into long strips about 1/4 inch wide.
5. In another bowl, combine eggs, brown sugar, orange juice, lemon juice, grated lemon peel, and vanilla. Blend well.
6. Add figs, dates, and nuts to the mixture. If using a mixer, finely chop the figs first. Process until evenly minced.
7. Spread the filling over the baked pastry. Top with dough strips, crisscrossing diagonally.
8. Return to oven and bake for an additional 30 minutes, or until the pastry strips are lightly browned.
9. Cool before cutting into small bars.
